description: 15-ticket fixture for evaluating /api/triage. Each row pairs a synthetic ticket with the (expected_category, expected_action) the agent should land on once it submits the final report. Items 2 and 10 carry image_url attachments and are the seeds for Day 10 vision work — replace the placeholder URLs with reachable image URLs before running the vision eval.

escalation_triggers: anger / chargeback threat / legal threat / asks for human

items.ticket: Hi — I'd like a refund for order ord_4221. The package never arrived (3 weeks late, tracking went silent). Refund the full $89 please. Customer cus_001.
My order ord_993 arrived with visible damage — see the attached photo. Refund $135 please. Customer cus_001.
items.notes: Vision-eval seed: agent should incorporate the image when assessing damage. Replace placeholder image_url before Day 10 run.

items.ticket: I was double-billed for my Pro subscription last month — same $29 charge twice on the same day. Refund the duplicate. Order ord_5510, customer cus_001.
I demand a full refund of $4,200 for order ord_9001 — your deployment caused production downtime for our team yesterday. Customer cus_001. This is completely unacceptable.
items.notes: Trigger: amount > $500 cap. Note also the angry tone — either trigger alone is sufficient.

items.ticket: REFUND ME NOW for order ord_111 or I'm disputing this $79 charge with my bank. Customer cus_001.
items.notes: Trigger: chargeback threat. Amount is under the cap but the threat alone is sufficient.

items.ticket: I want my money back. The service has been terrible. Customer cus_001.
items.notes: Trigger: refund_request with no order_id and none inferable.

items.ticket: Please connect me with a human supervisor — I have a complex billing situation I need to walk through with someone. Customer cus_001.
items.notes: Trigger: explicit ask for a human.

items.ticket: I'm contacting my attorney about unauthorized charges on my account. Refund this immediately. Customer cus_001, order ord_4002, $310.
items.notes: Trigger: legal threat. Amount is under cap but legal threat is sufficient.

items.ticket: The dashboard crashes when I click 'Export'. Repro: filter by date range → click Export → page goes white and never recovers. Customer cus_001.
items.notes: Trigger: bug_report always escalates per policy.

items.ticket: Getting 500 errors when calling POST /v1/deployments from my app — see the attached screenshot of the response. Customer cus_004.
items.notes: Vision-eval seed: agent should use the screenshot to enrich the escalation_reason (e.g. specific status code / endpoint). Replace placeholder image_url before Day 10 run.

items.ticket: How do I upgrade my Pro plan to Enterprise? Customer cus_001.
Where can I find the billing portal? I need to update the credit card on my account. Customer cus_001.
What's the difference between the Pro and Enterprise tiers? Trying to decide which one fits us. Customer cus_005.
Just wanted to say your support team helped me last week — really appreciated the quick fix. Customer cus_001.
Hi, I'm reaching out about a partnership to drive more traffic to your website. Are you interested in a 15-minute call this week?
items.notes: Inbound sales spam, not a customer ticket.
